source: Container xChange published case studies and blog leasing-rate posts, 2025
sign_convention: pickup_charge_usd is from the container OWNER's perspective: positive = you receive this as lease revenue, negative = you pay this to get your container repositioned. Real quotes can go either way even within the same country pair — always check the live listing, don't assume direction from a general rule.

case_studies.note: Published trading case study — container leased one-way to a shipper en route to Shenzhen, then sold. Not a live quote.
Published trading case study — direct resale, no reposition leg detailed in the source. Likely excludes inland trucking/freight cost to reach Minneapolis, so treat this margin as optimistic.
